query:
SELECT p.id AS product_id,
       p.`batchNo` AS batch_no,
       p.`serialNumber` AS serial_number,
       p.`currentStationCode` AS current_station_code,
       p.`currentStatus` AS current_status,
       st.`stationCode` AS station_code,
       st.`taskStatus` AS task_status,
       st.`resultSummary` AS result_summary,
       st.`completedAt` AS completed_at
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_tasks st ON st.`productId` = p.id
WHERE p.`batchNo` LIKE 'FLOW-STOCK-BATCH-%'
  AND p.`archivedAt` IS NULL
ORDER BY p.id DESC, st.id ASC
LIMIT 20;
